details: Wrote Pac-Man pitch per CEO directive. Acknowledged complexity (ghost AI with 4 personalities, maze rendering, scatter/chase cycles, cornering input). Proposed v1 scope cuts: simplified Inky targeting, fixed scatter/chase timing (no per-level tuning), single fruit (cherry), deferred Cruise Elroy and death animation to v2. Estimated 500-650 LOC. Updated state.json pipeline.pitched.
